_note: Original, owned PAX news content — written for this remaster in the spirit of the original's darkly-comic Chiba tabloid. NOT the original game's text. Ships freely (no BYO files).

news.headline: Chiba Air Declared 'Technically Weather'
news.body: The Port Authority reclassified the haze over Ninsei this morning, citing particulate density 'indistinguishable from a low cloud.' Residents still running original-issue lungs are advised to upgrade while the exchange rate holds.

news.headline: Third Cowboy Flatlines This Week
news.body: Another console jockey burned out mid-run, the boards report, scorched by ICE that wasn't on the grid a month ago. The cyberspace community has taken to calling Tuesdays 'a bad day to be talented.'

news.headline: Zaibatsu Denies Unnamed Event
news.body: A major Chiba corporation firmly denied involvement today in an incident it would not describe, at a location it declined to specify, concerning persons it could not confirm had ever existed. The statement was applauded by no one.

news.headline: Freeside Bookings Up, Checkouts Down
news.body: The orbital resort reports record arrivals and a near-record number of guests who have 'chosen to extend their stay indefinitely.' Management calls the ratio 'well within the brochure.'

news.headline: Rent-a-Cop unionizes, arrests self for loitering on first shift.
Man sells last kidney for deck upgrade; reviews the purchase 'worth it.'
Noodle cart debuts new protein; vendor politely requests that you not ask.
Pachinko parlor achieves sentience, immediately develops a gambling problem.
PAX reminds users: everything you read here is logged, sold, and read aloud at corporate functions for morale.
